meaning: National Research Development Corporation (英国) 国家科学研究开发公司
examples: The NRDC study rates Pima County, Ariz., where Tuscon is located, as an area with extreme risk of water shortage.
In 1999 the NRDC tested more than 1,000 bottles of 103 brands of water. (This is the most recent major report on bottled water safety.)
The American west is heating up at nearly twice the rate of the rest of the world, the Natural Resources Defense Council (NRDC) said on Friday.
"Biofuels will not work in isolation, " says Nathanael Greene, the NRDC report's principal author.
Screen savers actually make things worse, using 28% more power than normal, says the NRDC's Horowitz.
